scripts.quality: pnpm api:check && pnpm lint && pnpm test && pnpm --filter api test:e2e && pnpm build
scripts.api:generate: pnpm --filter api db:generate && pnpm --filter api openapi:generate && pnpm --filter admin api:generate
scripts.api:check: pnpm api:generate && git diff --exit-code apps/api/openapi.json apps/admin/src/generated/api
scripts.deploy:init: docker compose --env-file .env.deploy build api && docker compose --env-file .env.deploy run --rm api pnpm --filter api deploy:init
scripts.deploy:migrate: docker compose --env-file .env.deploy build api && docker compose --env-file .env.deploy run --rm api pnpm --filter api deploy:migrate
